name: What's average back injury settlement in Utah work comp?

mainEntity.name: What's average back injury settlement in Utah work comp?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**$50k-$200k typical for moderate; higher for surgery/permanent.**

Utah bases on impairment, wages; no public avg but cases show lump sums + medicals.[1][7 similar]

- Rating x multiplier.
- Lost earning capacity.
- Future care.

Attorney values accurately vs. low offers.[1]
